summary: Iteration 252 — Testing Case Study page (/caso-studio) and Copy to Clipboard buttons in Content Engine DraftDetail. All tests passed. Case Study is a public page (no login required) with all 5 sections, 4 problem cards, 6 solution steps, 4 metric cards, 3 change cards, and CTA buttons working. Copy to Clipboard buttons (btn-copy-full, btn-copy-hashtags, btn-copy-title, btn-copy-body, btn-copy-cta) all present in DraftDetail view.
